title: Polish README with customer-facing style
description: Update README.md using professional style - features, installation, usage examples

title: Create beautiful marketing README
description: Design compelling README with hero section, GIF demos (port increment, --list), feature comparison table, badges, screenshots. Target: GitHub stars and first-time users.

title: Add git-aware features to lookit
description: Show git status in directory listings (modified/staged/untracked), display current branch, show commit metadata on hover, integrate git blame and history views.

title: Publish lookit to npm
description: Prepare package for npm publish: update package.json with repo URL, add keywords, test local install, publish to registry. Verify package name 'lookit' availability.

title: Complete directory listing with .gitignore support
description: Finish Task 9 from artifacts/current - implement directory listing with file icons, sizes, dates, and .gitignore filtering

title: Write comprehensive test suite
description: Create test/comprehensive-test.sh as defined in Task 11 - test all file types, directory listing, .gitignore support

title: Make SSL work system-wide
description: Integrate mkcert for trusted local HTTPS. Auto-detect certs in ~/.config/lookit/, provide setup command, fallback to HTTP with clear instructions.

title: Create lookit marketing website
description: Build landing page matching dark theme: hero with demo, feature showcase, installation guide, GitHub stars counter. Host on GitHub Pages or Vercel. Domain options: lookit.dev, lookit.io, getlookit.com.
